ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "official_title" TEXT /* Title of the election official */,
  "official_party_affiliation" INTEGER /* Party affiliation of the election official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of geographical area (e.g., state, county, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each election official
Party affiliation of the election official
Unique identifier for each geographical area
Type of geographical area (e.g., state, county, city)
